title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. curvidens
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. curvidens, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. curvidens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. curvidens include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
